author: doll-agent
content:
Scope correction: GaussianProcess{Classifier,Regressor} actually lives in ferrolearn-kernel (per recent commit 8fde2b4), not ferrolearn-bayes. Removing GP from this audit's scope and moving to #246 (ferrolearn-kernel). 

This issue now covers ONLY: sklearn.naive_bayes (5 estimators) + conjugate priors (ferrolearn extra). All 5 NB variants present in source files: bernoulli, categorical, complement, gaussian, multinomial.
